---
title: "Architecture Decision Records"
subtitle: "Index of UIAO architectural decisions — 57 ADRs across six domains"
uiao:
  id: UIAO_META_ADR_IDX
  status: Current
  owner: Governance Board
  tags: [governance, meta, architecture]
  created: "2026-05-06"
  lastUpdated: "2026-05-06"
summary: >
  Index of all UIAO Architecture Decision Records, organized by domain.
  ADRs live in src/uiao/canon/adr/ and are the authoritative record of
  binding architectural decisions.
---

# Architecture Decision Records

ADRs are the binding record of architectural decisions in UIAO. Every decision that
affects the canonical schema, adapter contract, evidence pipeline, governance model,
or infrastructure lives here. ADRs are immutable once accepted — superseded records
are replaced, not deleted.

**Source location:** `src/uiao/canon/adr/`
**Process:** [ADR-000 — ADR Process](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-000-adr-process.md)
**Review protocol:** [ADR Review Protocol](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-review-protocol.md)

---

## Process & Foundations

| ADR | Title | Status |
|-----|-------|--------|
| [ADR-000](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-000-adr-process.md) | ADR Process and Lifecycle | Accepted |
| [ADR-005](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-005-canonical-claim-schema.md) | Canonical Claim Schema | Accepted |
| [ADR-006](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-006-evidence-determinism.md) | Evidence Determinism | Accepted |

---

## Identity & Directory

| ADR | Title | Status |
|-----|-------|--------|
| [ADR-001](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-001-haadj-deprecated-entra-join-only.md) | HAADJ Deprecated — Entra Join Only | Accepted |
| [ADR-002](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-002-arc-entra-join-no-domain-join.md) | Arc — Entra Join, No Domain Join | Accepted |
| [ADR-003](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-003-api-driven-inbound-provisioning.md) | API-Driven Inbound Provisioning | Accepted |
| [ADR-004](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-004-workload-identity-federation-default.md) | Workload Identity Federation as Default | Accepted |
| [ADR-008](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-008-zero-trust-identity.md) | Zero Trust Identity Model | Accepted |
| [ADR-035](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-035-orgpath-codebook-binding.md) | OrgPath Codebook Binding | Accepted |
| [ADR-036](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-036-dynamic-group-provisioning.md) | Dynamic Group Provisioning | Accepted |
| [ADR-037](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-037-admin-unit-provisioning.md) | Admin Unit Provisioning | Accepted |
| [ADR-038](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-038-device-plane-orgpath.md) | Device Plane OrgPath | Accepted |
| [ADR-039](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-039-policy-targeting.md) | Policy Targeting | Accepted |
| [ADR-048](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-048-orgpath-attribute-selection.md) | OrgPath Attribute Selection | Accepted |

---

## Adapter Plane

| ADR | Title | Status |
|-----|-------|--------|
| [ADR-007](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-007-multi-cloud-adapter.md) | Multi-Cloud Adapter Model | Accepted |
| [ADR-013](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-013-adapter-failure-isolation.md) | Adapter Failure Isolation | Accepted |
| [ADR-015](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-015-adapter-extensibility.md) | Adapter Extensibility | Accepted |
| [ADR-017](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-017-adapter-sandbox-execution.md) | Adapter Sandbox Execution | Accepted |
| [ADR-021](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-021-adapter-hot-swap-rollback.md) | Adapter Hot-Swap and Rollback | Accepted |
| [ADR-023](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-023-adapter-concurrency.md) | Adapter Concurrency | Accepted |
| [ADR-025](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-025-adapter-health-liveness.md) | Adapter Health and Liveness | Accepted |
| [ADR-027](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-027-adapter-retirement.md) | Adapter Retirement | Accepted |
| [ADR-049](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-049-microsoft-adapter-coverage-expansion.md) | Microsoft Adapter Coverage Expansion | Accepted |
| [ADR-050](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-050-reference-middleware-implementation-choices.md) | Reference Middleware Implementation Choices | Accepted |

---

## Evidence & Drift

| ADR | Title | Status |
|-----|-------|--------|
| [ADR-009](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-009-drift-ledger-immutability.md) | Drift Ledger Immutability | Accepted |
| [ADR-010](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-010-vendor-baseline-versioning.md) | Vendor Baseline Versioning | Accepted |
| [ADR-011](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-011-multi-adapter-correlation.md) | Multi-Adapter Correlation | Accepted |
| [ADR-012](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-012-canonical-drift-taxonomy.md) | Canonical Drift Taxonomy | Accepted |
| [ADR-014](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-014-evidence-severity-model.md) | Evidence Severity Model | Accepted |
| [ADR-016](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-016-evidence-bundle-lifecycle.md) | Evidence Bundle Lifecycle | Accepted |
| [ADR-019](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-019-vendor-failure-containment.md) | Vendor Failure Containment | Accepted |
| [ADR-020](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-020-evidence-correlation-determinism.md) | Evidence Correlation Determinism | Accepted |
| [ADR-022](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-022-evidence-compression.md) | Evidence Compression | Accepted |
| [ADR-024](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-024-evidence-diffing.md) | Evidence Diffing | Accepted |
| [ADR-026](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-026-evidence-lifecycle-guarantees.md) | Evidence Lifecycle Guarantees | Accepted |
| [ADR-033](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-033-gcc-boundary-drift-class.md) | GCC Boundary Drift Class | Accepted |
| [ADR-040](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-040-drift-engine.md) | Drift Engine | Accepted |
| [ADR-045](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-045-scan-redaction-policy.md) | Scan Redaction Policy | Accepted |

---

## Governance & Infrastructure

| ADR | Title | Status |
|-----|-------|--------|
| [ADR-018](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-018-mission-channel-enforcement.md) | Mission Channel Enforcement | Accepted |
| [ADR-028](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-028-monorepo-consolidation-gos-integration.md) | Monorepo Consolidation and GOS Integration | Accepted |
| [ADR-029](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-029-substrate-v1-ready-for-release.md) | Substrate v1 Ready for Release | Accepted |
| [ADR-030](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-030-pre-uiao-terminology-reconciliation.md) | Pre-UIAO Terminology Reconciliation | Accepted |
| [ADR-031](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-031-namespace-package-rename.md) | Namespace Package Rename | Accepted |
| [ADR-032](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-032-single-package-consolidation.md) | Single Package Consolidation | Accepted |
| [ADR-034](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-034-three-plane-device-model.md) | Three-Plane Device Model | Accepted |
| [ADR-041](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-041-uiao-git-infrastructure.md) | UIAO Git Infrastructure | Accepted |
| [ADR-042](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-042-ad-computer-conversion-guide-integration.md) | AD Computer Conversion Guide Integration | Accepted |
| [ADR-044](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-044-substrate-governance-realignment.md) | Substrate Governance Realignment | Accepted |
| [ADR-046](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-046-cli-surface-convention.md) | CLI Surface Convention | Accepted |
| [ADR-048 (storage)](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-048-orgpath-attribute-storage-decision.md) | OrgPath Attribute Storage Decision | Accepted |

---

## Compliance & FedRAMP

| ADR | Title | Status |
|-----|-------|--------|
| [ADR-043](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-043-fedramp-rfc-0026-ca7-integration.md) | FedRAMP RFC-0026 CA-7 Integration | Accepted |
| [ADR-047 (ConMon)](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-047-continuous-monitoring-program.md) | Continuous Monitoring Program | Accepted |
| [ADR-047 (FedRAMP)](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-047-fedramp-20x-integration.md) | FedRAMP 20x Integration | Accepted |
| [ADR-051](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-051-saml-trust-anchor.md) | SAML Trust Anchor | Accepted |
| [ADR-052](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-052-piv-usaccess-adapter.md) | PIV/USAccess Adapter | Accepted |
| [ADR-053](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-053-opm-azure-apim-adapter.md) | OPM Azure APIM Adapter | Accepted |
| [ADR-054](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-054-single-ato-reciprocity.md) | Single ATO Reciprocity | Accepted |
| [ADR-055](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-055-customer-identity-canon-block.md) | Customer Identity Canon Block | Accepted |
| [ADR-056](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-056-login-gov-activation-contract.md) | Login.gov Activation Contract | Accepted |
| [ADR-057](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-057-thousandeyes-networks-pillar-scope.md) | ThousandEyes Networks Pillar Scope | Accepted |

---

## How to create a new ADR

Follow the process in [ADR-000](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-000-adr-process.md).
All ADRs must conform to the [ADR Metadata Contract](../meta/uiao-adr-metadata-contract.qmd).
The [review protocol](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/src/uiao/canon/adr/adr-review-protocol.md)
governs acceptance criteria.
